scripts.add:android:athlete: cd apps/athlete && npx cap add android && npx cap open android
scripts.add:android:creator: cd apps/creator && npx cap add android && npx cap open android
scripts.start:creator: nx serve creator --port=4300
scripts.athlete:open: cd apps/athlete && npx cap open android
scripts.creator:open: cd apps/creator && npx cap open android
scripts.creator:android: cd apps/creator && npx cap build android && npx cap open android
scripts.creator:sync: cd apps/creator && nx build creator --configuration=production && npx cap sync && npx cap open android && npm run sync-files-creator:creator
scripts.athlete:sync: cd apps/athlete && nx build athlete --configuration=production && npx cap sync && npx cap open android && npm run sync-files-creator:athlete
scripts.dev:athlete:celular: cd apps/athlete && npx cap sync && npx cap open android && npx cap run android -l --host=192.168.1.28 --port=3001
scripts.dev:creator:celular: cd apps/creator && npx cap sync && npx cap open android && npx cap run android -l --host=192.168.1.26 --port=3000
scripts.cap:athlete:open: cd apps/athlete && npx cap open android
scripts.ios:emulator-creator: cd apps/creator && npx cap sync && nx build creator && npx cap run ios --live-reload
scripts.sync-files-creator:ios: cd apps/creator && npx cap sync ios && cd ../../ && node scripts/sync-ios-files-creator.js && cd apps/creator && npx cap open ios
scripts.sync-files-athlete:ios: cd apps/athlete && npx cap sync ios && cd ../../ && node scripts/sync-ios-files-athlete.js && cd apps/athlete && npx cap open ios
scripts.sync-files-creator:creator: cd apps/creator && npx cap sync android && cd ../../ && node scripts/sync-android-files-creator.js
scripts.sync-files-creator:athlete: cd apps/athlete && npx cap sync android && cd ../../ && node scripts/sync-android-files-athlete.js
scripts.resources:android:creator: cd apps/creator &&  npx capacitor-assets generate --android
scripts.resources:ios:creator: cd apps/creator &&  npx capacitor-assets generate --ios
scripts.dev:athlete:celular:windows: cd apps/athlete ; npx cap sync ; npx cap open android ; npx cap run android -l --host=192.168.1.28 --port=3001
scripts.prepare:publish:athlete: cd apps/athlete && npx cap sync &&nx build athlete
scripts.prepare:publish:creator: cd apps/creator && npx cap sync &&nx build creator
